# IntD - Integer Decomposition Calculator

> A web tool that decomposes a target integer into item-and-quantity combinations using a constrained DFS algorithm. Given a total amount and a set of item price ranges, it enumerates valid decompositions and ranks them by two strategies: fewest plastic bags (minimize item count) or most balanced quantities.

## Pages

- [Calculator](https://intd.chingru.com/): Enter a target amount and get decomposition results. Supports shuffle to explore alternative combinations.
- [Algorithm](https://intd.chingru.com/algo): Explains the constrained DFS approach, pruning strategy, and ranking modes with pseudocode.
- [About](https://intd.chingru.com/about): Project background and motivation.

## Notes

- Available in Traditional Chinese (zh-Hant) and English.
- Source code: https://github.com/rutopio/intd
